invalidated_by_rework.reason: Rollback for UI stack change: Material UI adoption voids prior design/tasks/validation until re-approved.

rework_history.feedback: Adopt Material UI (MUI) as the frontend component library for the `web/` app. Replace Tailwind-first styling with MUI: add `@mui/material`, Emotion peers (`@emotion/react`, `@emotion/styled`), and integrate with Next.js App Router per MUI docs (e.g. `ThemeProvider`, `CssBaseline`, optional `AppRouterCacheProvider` / emotion cache for SSR). Refactor dashboard, forms, table, dialogs, and summary UI to MUI components while preserving behavior, accessibility, and existing test coverage (MSW + RTL). Update `design.md` (and downstream `tasks.md` when re-drafted) to document the MUI theme, layout patterns, and any icon package (`@mui/icons-material` if used). Do not leave duplicate styling systems unless transitional; prefer one primary UI system (MUI).

last_approval.notes: Superseded by rework 2026-04-16 — validation approval void until pipeline re-completes.

notes: Rework active: revise design for MUI, then re-draft tasks → implementation → validation. Prior validation v1 registry kept for history only.
